ocl:
context Alert
inv: (self.rule <> null) and (self.acknowledged = false)

context AlertRule
inv: self.alerts->exists(x | x.acknowledged <> true)

context Network
inv: self.links->any(x | x.bandwidthKbps >= 10) <> null

context SolarPanel
inv: self.wattPeak >= 58 and self.wattPeak <= 96

context ActuatorNode
inv: self.maxLoad >= 64 and self.maxLoad <= 78

context Firmware
inv: (self.devices->exists(x | x.deviceId <> '')) and (not(self.devices->exists(x | x.deviceId <> '')))

context DataStream
inv: ((self.link <> null) and (self.records->notEmpty())) and (not((self.link <> null) and (self.records->notEmpty())))

context ConnectivityModule
inv: (self.links->forAll(x | x.bandwidthKbps <= 10)) and (not(self.links->forAll(x | x.bandwidthKbps <= 10)))

context Location
inv: (self.longitude >= 26 and self.longitude <= 76) and (self.longitude < 26)

context Cluster
inv: (self.gateways->collect(x | x.connectedEdges)->size() >= 2) and (not(self.gateways->collect(x | x.connectedEdges)->size() >= 2))

context Role
inv: (self.users->exists(x | x.userId <> '')) and (not(self.users->exists(x | x.userId <> '')))

context DataStream
inv: (self.alertRules->excluding(self.alertRules->any(true))->size() < self.alertRules->size()) and (not(self.alertRules->excluding(self.alertRules->any(true))->size() < self.alertRules->size()))

context Cluster
inv: (self.edgeNodes->exists(x | x.cpuCores < 1000)) and (not(self.edgeNodes->exists(x | x.cpuCores < 1000)))

context TelemetryRecord
inv: (self.payload <> null) and (not(self.payload <> null))
